title: Nothorhipsalis paranganiensis
taxonomy: Nothorhipsalis paranganiensis is a species of plant in the cactus family, Cactaceae. It belongs to the genus Nothorhipsalis, which is a group of epiphytic cacti. The plant is native to Venezuela and is a relatively rare species. Nothorhipsalis paranganiensis is part of the order Caryophyllales and class Magnoliopsida, further categorizing its classification. Its classification is also sometimes referred to as being part of the clade Angiosperms.

intro: Nothorhipsalis paranganiensis is a species of cactus, belonging to the family of living stones known as Rhipsalidae. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including inflammation, fever, and respiratory problems, due to its potential anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and expectorant properties.
